items.title: Add NoxBaseBot - Crypto Telegram Bot Development Services
items.description:
## Suggestion: Add NoxBaseBot / NOX Dev Services

**Category:** Freelance Bot & Smart Contract Development

**What:** Custom Telegram bot development for crypto/DeFi projects. Live production bot with 60+ commands: [@NoxBaseBot](https://t.me/NoxBaseBot)

**Services:** Custom bots ($50-500), smart contract reviews ($75-150), DeFi integrations, price alerts, portfolio trackers.

**Details:** https://gist.github.com/dayi1000/06738ad554bcd65d63ac4aeb26a7dfb0

**Tech:** Node.js, Web3.js, Base chain, Telegram Bot API

Would be a great addition to the freelancer resources list for developers offering crypto-specific bot development services.

items.title: Question for freelancers: biggest challenge right now?
items.description:
Hi,

I’m trying to understand real challenges freelancers face while working remotely.

If you freelance or do contract work, I’d really appreciate your input:
What’s the biggest problem you’re dealing with right now?

Clients, pricing, payments, proposals, burnout — or something else?

No selling or promotion — just learning from real experiences.
Thanks!

items.title: Opportunity
items.description:
Looking for Python Fullstack Developer.

Mandatory Skills: Python frameworks (FastAPI, Flask, Django), REST API implementation, Database (PostgreSQL, MSSQL), Terraform, Authentication (OAuth, JWT), SSIS, Microservices, AWS(Lambda, S3)

Preferred: Over 5 years of experience

Nice to Have: LLM and NLP-LLM GenAI Background

Please reach out to me on telegram(@vezcurve) and twitter(@veczurve)

Thanks!

items.title: [Request] Guide for Managing Time Zones for Remote Freelancers
items.description:
Hello, I would suggest creating a guide or resource for managing time while working as a remote freelancer. We know that working remotely may have different time zones between the freelancer and employer.

## Suggested Topics
1. **Setting Up a Schedule**: Tips for creating and sticking to a productive work schedule.
2. **Tools and Apps**: Overview of tools and apps that aid in time management and productivity.
3. **Avoiding Burnout**: Strategies for balancing workloads and preventing overwork.
4. **Setting Boundaries**: Advice on maintaining a professional boundary between work and personal life.
5. **Efficiency Techniques**: Methods like Pomodoro or time blocking to enhance focus and efficiency.

## Expected Impact
- **Enhanced Productivity**: Assisting freelancers in managing their time more effectively.
- **Resource Enrichment**: Making TheRemoteFreelancer a more comprehensive guide for freelancers.
- **Community Engagement**: Encouraging discussions and sharing of best practices among freelancers.
